locations.name: Al Lang Stadium
locations.clue: A waterfront stadium, home of the Tampa Bay Rowdies.

locations.name: Boyd Hill Nature Preserve
locations.clue: A 245-acre nature preserve with trails along Lake Maggiore.

locations.name: Chihuly Collection
locations.clue: A permanent home for Dale Chihuly's blown-glass art on Central Ave.

locations.name: Duncan McClellan Gallery
locations.clue: A renowned glass-art gallery in the Warehouse Arts District.

locations.name: Florida Holocaust Museum
locations.clue: One of the largest Holocaust museums in the U.S., downtown.

locations.name: Fort De Soto County Park
locations.clue: A sprawling beach park with a historic fort at the mouth of Tampa Bay.

locations.name: Great Explorations Children's Museum
locations.clue: A hands-on children’s museum next to Sunken Gardens.

locations.name: Imagine Museum
locations.clue: A museum devoted to contemporary studio glass art.

locations.name: Isla Del Sol
locations.clue: A golf & yacht club on an island community south of downtown.

locations.name: Jannus Live
locations.clue: An open-air downtown courtyard music venue, one of Florida’s oldest.

locations.name: Kress Building
locations.clue: A historic five-and-dime building on Central Avenue.

locations.name: Mangrove Bay Golf Course
locations.clue: St. Pete's municipal golf course on Tampa Bay.

locations.name: Morean Arts Center
locations.clue: A downtown arts center with a glass-blowing hot shop.

locations.name: Museum of Fine Arts
locations.clue: St. Pete's flagship fine-art museum on the downtown waterfront.

locations.name: Pasadena Yacht & Country Club
locations.clue: A gated golf & yacht country club near Gulfport.

locations.name: Snell Arcade
locations.clue: An ornate 1920s Mediterranean Revival arcade building downtown.

locations.name: St. Pete Pier
locations.clue: The modern 26-acre pier district reaching into Tampa Bay.

locations.name: St. Petersburg Museum of History
locations.clue: City history museum by the Pier — near the first airline flight site.

locations.name: Sunken Gardens
locations.clue: A 100-year-old botanical garden, one of St. Pete's oldest attractions.

locations.name: Tampa Bay Watch Discovery Center
locations.clue: A marine-education center out on the St. Pete Pier.

locations.name: The Dalí Museum
locations.clue: Home to the largest Salvador Dalí collection outside Europe, under a glass 'enigma'.

locations.name: The Don CeSar
locations.clue: The 'Pink Palace' — a historic 1928 resort hotel on the Gulf beach.

locations.name: The James Museum
locations.clue: Western & wildlife art behind a carved-canyon entryway downtown.

locations.name: The Palladium Theater
locations.clue: A historic former church turned downtown concert hall.

locations.name: The State Theatre
locations.clue: A historic downtown live-music theater on Central Ave.

locations.name: Tropicana Field
locations.clue: The domed ballpark that was home to the Tampa Bay Rays.

locations.name: Twin Brooks Golf Course
locations.clue: A city-run executive golf course & driving range.

locations.name: Vinoy Park
locations.clue: A downtown waterfront park that hosts festivals and concerts.

locations.name: Woodson African American Museum
locations.clue: St. Pete's African American history & culture museum.
